trades.reasoning: Strong multi-signal confirmation (RSI 63.3 bullish zone, MACD bullish crossover, histogram rising, price above SMA-20) adds fintech diversification while cash sits well above the $500 threshold with open slots.

decisions.briefing: Markets were flat-to-slightly-down today (NASDAQ -0.3%, S&P500 +0.0%), a neutral session with no clear directional signal. Rather than force full deployment, I made one modest, well-confirmed buy (NU) to put some idle cash to work while holding the rest in reserve for a genuine risk-on day. All six existing positions are held unchanged.

market_education.summary_en: Today was a quiet, directionless session with the NASDAQ down 0.3% and the S&P 500 essentially flat, suggesting investors are in a wait-and-see mode rather than reacting to any major catalyst. Without a strong risk-on or risk-off trigger, it made sense to be selective rather than aggressive with new capital. Existing winners were left alone since low-conviction, sideways days aren't a reason to exit positions that are already working.
market_education.summary_zh: 今天市場走勢平淡,納指下跌0.3%,標普500指數幾乎持平,顯示投資人正處於觀望狀態,並未對任何重大消息作出明顯反應。在缺乏明確的風險偏好訊號下,選擇性佈局比大舉加碼更為合理。現有的獲利部位維持不動,因為橫盤整理的中性行情並非出場的理由。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing means buying stocks that are already showing upward price strength, confirmed by indicators like RSI (measuring speed of price moves) and MACD (measuring trend direction). Today's buy was chosen because it showed several of these bullish signals lining up at once, not just one isolated indicator.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資是指買入價格已展現上漲力道的股票,並透過RSI(衡量價格變動速度)和MACD(衡量趨勢方向)等指標加以確認。今天選擇買入的標的,是因為多個看漲訊號同時出現,而非僅憑單一指標做決定。
